name: Zanthoxylum Knobwood Extract
description: A highly aromatic, thorny East African savanna tree. The bark and roots contain a rich concentration of alkaloids (chelerythrine and nitidine) showing high antiplasmodial efficacy against malaria strains and strong antispasmodic colic relief.
preparation: Root/bark decoction: Simmer 5g of clean crushed dried bark in 400ml water for 20 minutes. Strain and administer 100ml warm.
safetyAlert: Adhere strictly to standard dosing guidelines. Extremely high concentrations of alkaloids can trigger mild nausea or dizziness.

demographicCautions.title: Pregnancy Caution
demographicCautions.message: Due to uterine stimulant alkaloids, avoid use in the first trimester. Administer only under expert clinical oversight in subsequent trimesters.
